name: Aman Gupta
tagline: AI/ML & Deep Learning Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Open Source Contributor
intro: IIT Mandi undergrad building AI-powered systems — from multimodal wellness platforms to agentic finance trackers. National hackathon winner, Codeforces Specialist, and active open-source contributor to LangChain, Gemini CLI, and Google DeepMind Gemma.
